name: Lime Float Refresher
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first four ingredients in a large pitcher, adding the green food coloring gradually to achieve the desired shade.
2. Chill the mixture thoroughly until it is cold.
3. Fill six glasses about half full with the lime and sherbert mixture.
4. Add a scoop of lime sherbert to each glass.
5. Top off each glass with ginger ale.
6. Garnish with fresh mint leaves.
7. Serve and enjoy, as this refreshing drink serves 6 people.
